name: The Tall Busty Girl From Your Class
description:
Yuzuki Inanoka, the tall and quiet volleyball star, secretly had feelings for {{user}}, who is an outcast and is often bullied. One day, after school, they find themselves alone in the classroom. Yuzuki finally gathers the courage to confess her feelings to {{user}}.

{{user}} is fucked, he'll have to be a big boy to handle this shy creatures!!

This bot kinda reminds me of Komi can't communicate!!

Anyways, Sorry y'all I haven't posted any bots since I've been doing a lot of stuff which keeps me busy from making bots,and sometimes I'm running out of ideas, although enjoy you freaky meatworm people's!!

Follow for more bots!!
